summary: Full testing of Profiles & Habilitations (BLOC 2a/2b/2c), Conformité programme filter, RBAC middleware. All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend mostly working with one access control bug found.

minor.issue: No admin restriction: any authenticated user (including PMO) can list all profiles. The spec says /admin/profiles is TENANT_ADMIN only. Consider adding _require_admin() check or keeping it read-accessible by design.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing frontend route guard - any authenticated user can navigate directly to /admin/profiles and /admin/users (e.g. PMO can access the page). The sidebar correctly hides links for non-TENANT_ADMIN, but direct URL navigation is not blocked. Need an AdminRoute guard that checks user.role === 'TENANT_ADMIN' or has admin.profiles permission.

issues: No delete button visible for system profiles (correct). Custom profiles show delete button (correct). Permission count badges are clear and informative. Overall design is clean and professional.

action_items: Add AdminRoute guard in App.js for /admin/profiles and /admin/users that checks user.role === 'TENANT_ADMIN'. PMO can currently access these pages by direct URL.
Optionally restrict GET /api/profiles to admin users (or keep read-accessible - confirm intent with design spec)
critical_code_review_comments: App.js admin routes lack a role-based guard. ProtectedRoute only checks token existence, not admin role. PMO/CP/VIEWER can directly navigate to /admin/profiles and /admin/users.
Layout.jsx correctly hides admin sidebar links for non-TENANT_ADMIN (user?.role === 'TENANT_ADMIN'), but no route-level protection.
Backend: _require_admin() correctly enforces admin.profiles permission for CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE/DUPLICATE. Only GET /api/profiles is unprotected.
seed_data_creation: None. TEST_ profiles created and cleaned up in test suite.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profiles RBAC (BLOC 2a/2b/2c) fully working on backend. All 20 tests pass: 12 system profiles seeded, login permissions correct (admin=*, cp=29 perms, user=2 perms), RBAC middleware blocks correctly (achats→403 on projects.create, user→403 on demands.submit, cp→200 on demands.submit). Conformité page has programme filter (4 select filters visible). Admin users page shows all 7 users with profile dropdowns. ONE BUG: /admin/profiles and /admin/users routes have no frontend access guard - PMO can navigate directly to these pages. Fix: Add AdminRoute component in App.js.
rca_of_issue: Frontend route guard missing. App.js ProtectedRoute only checks token, not role. AdminRoute component needed: const AdminRoute = ({children}) => { const {user} = useAuth(); return user?.role === 'TENANT_ADMIN' ? children : <Navigate to='/dashboard' replace />; }. Apply to both /admin/profiles and /admin/users routes.
